items.definition_en: A smartwatch is a watch that connects to your phone and shows information.
items.example_en: He wears a smartwatch to check his messages.

items.definition_en: A fitness band is a device you wear to track your activity.
items.example_en: She uses her fitness band to count her steps.

items.definition_en: A step counter is a tool that counts how many steps you take.
items.example_en: His step counter helps him walk more every day.

items.definition_en: Virtual glasses are electronic glasses that show digital images.
items.example_en: He likes playing games with virtual glasses.

items.definition_en: A smart ring is a ring that tracks your activity or health.
items.example_en: Her smart ring tells her when she gets a message.

items.definition_en: An activity tracker is a wearable device that watches your movement.
items.example_en: He wears an activity tracker to see how much he walks.

items.definition_en: Smart shoes are shoes with electronic sensors inside.
items.example_en: She bought smart shoes to help her run better.

items.definition_en: A sleep monitor is a device that checks how well you sleep.
items.example_en: The sleep monitor tells him how many hours he slept.

items.definition_en: A smart belt is a belt with sensors to track your waist or steps.
items.example_en: He uses a smart belt to check his health.

items.definition_en: A wearable camera is a small camera you wear on your body.
items.example_en: She records her bike rides with a wearable camera.

items.definition_en: A heart monitor is a device that checks your heartbeat.
items.example_en: He wears a heart monitor when he runs.

items.definition_en: A hearing aid is a small device to help people hear better.
items.example_en: Her grandfather uses a hearing aid at home.

items.definition_en: A smart badge is a card or tag with technology inside.
items.example_en: The worker uses a smart badge to enter the office.

items.definition_en: A body sensor is a small device that measures your body activity.
items.example_en: Athletes use body sensors during training.

items.definition_en: A smart glove is a glove with special sensors inside.
items.example_en: The smart glove helps him play games.

items.definition_en: A health tracker is a device that helps you watch your health.
items.example_en: Her health tracker shows her heart rate.

items.definition_en: A smart shirt is a shirt with tiny sensors inside.
items.example_en: He wears a smart shirt during exercise.

items.definition_en: A Bluetooth headset is worn on the ear to talk or listen.
items.example_en: She makes calls using her Bluetooth headset.

items.definition_en: A medical watch is worn to check your health information.
items.example_en: He uses a medical watch to watch his health.

items.definition_en: A GPS tracker is a device that shows your location.
items.example_en: The GPS tracker helps her find her lost bag.
